name: @ar-io/gateway
description: AR.IO Gateway wrapper for local development and Hetzner deployment

scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up --pull always
scripts.dev:detached: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d --pull always
scripts.restart: docker compose down && docker compose up -d --pull always
